name: Stalker
description: Patient and unnervingly smart; it hunts the player specifically after dark and barely stirs by day.
signature: still and watchful, gone when you look again — a shape at the edge of the dark that was not there a moment ago
notes: FR-CBT-07. At night, with the player at or next to its node, the T25 machine adds STALKER_NIGHT_BONUS so it drives to chasing from an otherwise-calm stimulus. Human-only canon: a person who has kept a terrible patience, never an animal.
